task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or home screen is visible in the web browser, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the specific target case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar, case list, or search results page shows the query 'Delayed Public Records Response - EPA Region 5'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details page or viewer is open, clearly displaying the title 'Delayed Public Records Response - EPA Region 5'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the priority edit process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit modal, form, or dropdown menu for the 'Priority' field is active or open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the case priority was successfully saved as High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details page displays the Priority field as 'High' for the 'Delayed Public Records Response - EPA Region 5' case, indicating the change was saved.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the ArkCase web interface rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser navigating the ArkCase GUI. There should be no terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the genuine ArkCase web application, not a text editor, word processor, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open, ensuring the text was not manually altered in the DOM to appear correct.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target case title is exactly 'Delayed Public Records Response - EPA Region 5'. The case initially has a priority of 'Low'. The agent must successfully change this priority to 'High' within the ArkCase web interface.
